item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description: have been traveling a lot. so if anyone has united milageplus things like miles/pluspoints they wouldnt mind gifting or using for my future travel things lemme know via dm here. #potato #memes #dailydirties #makinmywaydowntown #holdinhandstothefrontpage

item.title: Putting on a Corset After 30…
item.description:
Me when I pull out my old cosplays from my cosplay wear house to organize and see what I can still use…
For those curious about an update from yesterday’s vid… It’s embarrassing but if I don’t admit publicly I dropped my own phone on my face and gave myself a black eye, how else can I make fun of myself for the rest of my life… https://imgur.com/gallery/does-this-count-tt-UmhyCcZ
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Memes vol 707
item.description:
Me because my nose has been bleeding for like 3 days now
Worst book I’ve ever read because of the gore which is surprising because I’m into *a********* (but not like… sexually)
I had an intense interest with the donner party when I was 10 years old. Is it the fact their name so closely resembles dinner party? Who knows
Bruce tax
Gertie tax
Nessie tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: Know Your Enemy
item.description:
I’ve got no patience now
So sick of complacence now
Sick of sick of sick of sick of you
Time has come to pay…
Know your enemy!
Yes I know my enemies
They’re the teachers who taught me to fight me
Compromise, conformity, assimilation, submission
Ignorance, hypocrisy, brutality...the elite.

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1720 (big feelings)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
I want to pet the nurderfloof.
LOOKIT THOSE FEETS
Haven't pulled anyone yet, and vice versa. Applications are available i guess.
Hell yeah
After I get them, Ronald Regan.
It is better to do something right for the wrong reasons than to do nothing at all. It is better to do SOMETHING than to do nothing and talk about doing right things.
It's leet, fam.
Me, sips coffee from the galley slave cup.
This joke is really funny when you realize this bird is called a Western Kingbird
I like her emails.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "sorry sorry sorry fuck you!" ____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: He’s Wasting Away
item.description: If a MAGAt tries to tell you how manly and strong tRump is, ask them if he’s more masculine than they are and watch the squirming and back-pedaling begin. Will they admit tRump is less of a man’s man than they are or that he’s more masculine?
item.dc:creator: Resistance1000

item.title: The transaction was kept secret, with the cost borne by the entire nation
item.dc:creator: AngryGrapes0916

item.title: Nothing Says 'Fun' Like Watching Your Friends Get Fucking Laid Off First
item.description: So let me get this fucking straight. Step 1: Fire a pile of employees. Step 2: Demoralize everyone left. Step 3: Tell the survivors to have more FUN. That's not company culture. That's the corporate equivalent of sinking a ship and announcing a pool party. Imagine surviving layoffs, watching entire teams disappear, and then management bursts through the door like: "Good news everybody! It's HACKATHON TIME! ?" Mate, people aren't lacking fun. They're lacking job security. That's a slightly bigger fucking issue. The tech industry has become obsessed with treating employees like interchangeable batteries. Work harder. Work longer. Build the future. Change the world. Then one spreadsheet gets updated and suddenly you're escorted out carrying a cardboard box. You can't manufacture morale after a bloodbath by ordering people to smile harder. Trust isn't a software feature you can reinstall after deleting half the staff. Maybe the real hackathon challenge is figuring out why nobody believes corporate bullshit anymore. #Tech #Meta #Layoffs #CorporateCulture #AI #SiliconValley #Hackathon #Workplace https://futurism.com/artificial-intelligence/mark-zuckerberg-employees-fun-hackathon-layoffs
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: Patience only goes so far
item.description: Emory will not give up on his quest to be a hat for Elvira. Elvira, to her credit, is very, very patient with him. Small observation about imgur in general: we're really nearing the end here, folks. First it was posts needing just 50 votes to reach frontpage, now it seems even being on the frontpage gives most posts 10-20k views, where a year ago it was at least double, and jeez, back in the old days it was at least ten times that. There's very few of us left on this site, it seems. Enjoy it while you can! Edit: okay, look, this is fucking weird, another thing that sometimes still happens and makes me scratch my head. You're telling me suddenly this post has 167k views?? How, from where, who? I checked other FP posts, with more upvotes, memes and/or titties, and those only have less than 10k views, but supposedly this 30 second cat video and tiny rant gets in the six digit range somehow? How? How would this post do those numbers, but not the post right in front or behind it??
item.dc:creator: INeedMoreGifMeMoreJustOneMore

item.title: You deserve sunshine. ☀️??✨️
item.description: Happy pride to those who thise who are unsure of themselves, those who are still learning to be themselves, those who are not yet safe to be themselves, and those who embrace and love themselves for all that they are. Your life has value and you deserve to feel seen as you are. You deserve sunshine. ☀️ ?? ???? https://www.youtube.com/shorts/vf3Wcpj-ARc
item.dc:creator: PixelSprite64

item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: That Awkward Moment When You're Exposed

item.title: Apparently. RFK Jr. Has Had a Brain Worm Forever ... Threw a Snake into a Pool of Kids ... and Had a Blender For Chicks & Mice to Feed His Hawk ...
item.description: Kerry, one of Ethel and Robert F. Kennedy's 11 children, told CNN's Erin Burnett in a recent TV interview that she once witnessed her older brother, now the U.S. health secretary, allegedly wrangle a snake while holding his then-infant child. The concerning chain of events allegedly ended with RFK Jr. tossing the snake into a swimming pool full of children. Roughly 25 years ago, Kerry estimated, she threw her daughter a birthday party in their backyard. While her daughter and her friends were playing, Kerry noticed a snake in her garden and, knowing her brother liked animals and lived nearby, sought out his help. Upon hearing the news, RFK Jr. "rushed over" to Kerry's home, his young son Aiden gripped in one arm and a pillowcase clutched in the other. "And he grabbed the snake, and stuffed it into the pillowcase, while he was holding his infant son," Kerry recalled. "So that was a little scary." It didn't end there, according to Kerry. With the snake contained in the pillowcase, RFK Jr. and his young son approached the rest of the kids at the birthday party, reached into the sack and produced the snake itself for all to see. At the time, the snake was "just chomping on his hand," Kerry said of her brother. Then, Kerry claimed, RFK Jr. picked up a "vole" — a mix between a mouse and a mole — with his bare hands and tossed it inside the bag with the snake, "which made all the kids scream." RFK Jr. again got a reaction when he left the vole in the bag and retrieved the snake again, bare-handed. Kerry later accompanied her brother to his house down the street, where there were "tons of kids" playing in the pool. "And he released this snake, that had chomped on his hand, into the swimming pool," she alleged. RFK Jr.'s cousin Caroline Kennedy, daughter of the late President John F. Kennedy, also previously shared concerning tales of the politician's relationship with animals. In January 2025, on the eve of his Senate confirmation hearing, Caroline accused RFK Jr. of putting "baby chickens and mice into a blender to feed to his hawks." https://people.com/kerry-kennedy-says-rfk-jr-released-snake-pool-full-of-children-12000369
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: He thinks that because he can’t remember.
item.dc:creator: glorytoyouandyourpost
